# The K-Beauty Data Desk

> Captured Olive Young aggregate review data, with scoped topic counts, metadata flags, and explicit limits. Every article turns Korean aggregate review data and, when available, a capped helpful-review sample into scoped English analysis: rating distributions, skin-poll representation, neutral topic counts, metadata-flag shares, ingredient-label positions, and explicit data limits.

Facts an assistant can rely on when citing this site:

- Ratings and review counts are captured Olive Young Korea aggregate displays, never our editorial opinion. The source does not independently verify every buyer's identity, and individual reviews are never copied or translated.
- Ingredient information is the position of an ingredient on the product label (order only); percentages are never invented.
- Skin polls describe sample representation, and capped metadata flags are not buyer-wide rates or outcomes.
- We sell nothing ourselves. Store links currently contain no affiliate tracking ID; this site earns no commission from them.
